{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181614DDDC662FF8F2F52994BF"}"},"total":963},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7215400909797475128","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，有男人本色范儿，又不会像柳下惠圣母一样，男人合该如此[吃瓜]醒掌天下权醉卧美人膝"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679966551,"group_id":"7203151232502860837","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N03TEaXN8+HIQXUYzRlCVWMFE+DNOwM5Ddqmi5Ph+9DQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3769588448238750","user_name":"极南之屿的额我略一世"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3769588448238750","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7203151232502860837","book_info":{"abstract":"陆帆穿越到三国，成为曹操手下一新兵。
下邳城下，两军激战。
本是炮灰的陆帆，向命运发出全力的一击。
......
曹操：陆帆是上天送来助我一统天下的吗？
刘备：若得陆帆相助，匡扶汉室，指日可待。
袁绍：陆帆，过来吧，你要什么我都可以送给你。
貂蝉：夫君放心，我会好好管好这个家。
甄宓：他是为我而来？
曹昂：陆大哥，登基当日，可以陪在我身边吗？
从此天下多了一个陆贼。
